customers.name: Sarah
customers.orderText: Hi, um, can I get a... oh gosh, I'm so sorry, I'm really rushing today. Okay, a Tall Vanilla Latte, please. And actually, could I get that with oat milk? Yeah, oat milk. And then, uh, a Chocolate Croissant too, if you have those. Thanks!
customers.canonicalOrder: Tall Vanilla Latte, with oat milk, Chocolate Croissant

customers.name: Sarah
customers.orderText: Okay, hi! Um, I need a Venti Caramel Macchiato, but make that iced please. And actually, could I get an extra shot in there? You know what, also a Sausage Cheddar Egg Sandwich. Gotta run, thanks!
customers.canonicalOrder: Venti Caramel Macchiato, iced, with an extra shot, Sausage Cheddar Egg Sandwich

customers.name: Sarah
customers.orderText: Okay, hi. Can I get a Venti Iced White Chocolate Mocha? Uh, yeah, with an extra shot. And then, I also need an Impossible Breakfast Sandwich. Yeah, that's everything. Thanks.
customers.canonicalOrder: Venti Iced White Chocolate Mocha, with an extra shot, Impossible Breakfast Sandwich

customers.name: Sarah
customers.orderText: Hi! Um... can I get a... let's see. A caramel macchiato? Yeah. And, um, could that be an iced one? Grande, please. Oh, and, actually, could I get it with almond milk instead of regular? And, uh, a butter croissant too, please. Sorry, I'm still waking up!
customers.canonicalOrder: Grande Iced Caramel Macchiato, with almond milk, Butter Croissant

customers.name: Sarah
customers.orderText: Hi there! Um, okay, I'm gonna do a Venti Cold Brew, please. And, actually, could I get that with light ice? Yeah. And then also a butter croissant. That's it. Thanks!
customers.canonicalOrder: Venti Cold Brew, light ice, Butter Croissant

customers.name: Chloe
customers.orderText: Hi, can I get a Grande Iced Caramel Macchiato, and, um, just the Impossible Breakfast Sandwich, please. That's it.
customers.canonicalOrder: Grande Iced Caramel Macchiato, Impossible Breakfast Sandwich

customers.name: Sarah
customers.orderText: Okay, um, hi! Can I get, let's see... a Venti Caramel Macchiato? Oh, actually, can that be iced? Yeah, iced. And could I get, like, extra caramel drizzle? And, um, one of those, like, flaky butter croissants, please? Thanks!
customers.canonicalOrder: Venti Iced Caramel Macchiato, extra caramel drizzle, Butter Croissant

customers.name: Sarah
customers.orderText: Hi, yeah, um, can I just get a Grande Pike Place, extra hot? And then, uh, actually, can I also grab an Impossible Breakfast Sandwich? To go, please. Thanks.
customers.canonicalOrder: Grande Pike Place Roast, extra hot, Impossible Breakfast Sandwich

customers.name: Sarah
customers.orderText: Hi there! Um, okay, so, what am I in the mood for today... Hmm. I think I'll do a... you know what, let's do the Tall Iced Brown Sugar Oat Milk Shaken Espresso. Yeah, that one. And could I get that with, like, light ice, please? Oh, and actually, could I also get a Spinach Feta Egg Wrap? That's all. Thanks!
customers.canonicalOrder: Tall Iced Brown Sugar Oat Milk Shaken Espresso, light ice, Spinach Feta Egg Wrap

customers.name: Sarah
customers.orderText: Oh, hi! Good morning. Um, okay, so, let's see... what sounds good today? I think I'm gonna go with a... a Venti Caramel Macchiato, please. Oh, actually, wait, no, can I do that... um, iced? Yeah, iced. And can I get that with oat milk instead of regular milk? And, like, just a little bit less caramel drizzle on top, please. And then, uh, do you have any of the banana bread? The banana nut bread? Great! That's it, thank you!
customers.canonicalOrder: Venti Iced Caramel Macchiato, with oat milk, light extra caramel drizzle, Banana Nut Bread

customers.name: Sarah
customers.orderText: Oh, hey! Um... I'll do a... what was it? A tall Cinnamon Dolce Latte. Actually, can I get that with oat milk? And, um, could you do it half sweet, please? Yeah, half sweet. Oh! And a blueberry muffin too, if you have them. Thanks!
customers.canonicalOrder: Tall Cinnamon Dolce Latte, with oat milk, half sweet, Blueberry Muffin

customers.name: Sarah
customers.orderText: Hi, um, can I just get a Grande Blonde Vanilla Latte? Make that extra hot, please, and with oat milk instead of regular. Oh, and also, could I get one of those chocolate pistachio loaves? Just quickly warmed, please. That's all.
customers.canonicalOrder: Grande Starbucks® Blonde Vanilla Latte, extra hot, with oat milk, Chocolate Pistachio Loaf, Warmed

customers.name: Brenda
customers.orderText: Oh, hi there! Um, I think I'll do... hmm. Let's see. You know what, that Pistachio Latte sounds really good today. Yeah. Can I get a grande, please? And could you make that, like, extra hot for me? And with oat milk, if you have that? Oh, and also, I'll grab one of those... the little vanilla bean scones. They're so good. Thanks!
customers.canonicalOrder: Grande Pistachio Latte, extra hot, with oat milk, Petite Vanilla Bean Scone

customers.name: Sarah
customers.orderText: Hi there! Um, could I get an iced... Sun-Dried Ethiopia Highlands? Oh, and could you do that with oat milk? And a Grande, please. And then also... I think I'll grab one of those Ellenos Muesli yogurts, the no sugar one. Thanks!
customers.canonicalOrder: Grande Iced Sun-Dried Ethiopia Highlands with oat milk, Ellenos Muesli Yogurt – No Added Sugar

customers.name: Sarah
customers.orderText: Hey! So, I'm gonna do the Iced Double Berry Matcha, uh, a Grande, please. And could I get that with oat milk? Yeah, oat milk. And, um, light ice, actually, if you can. Oh, and then I'll also grab one of those Bacon, Sausage & Egg Wraps. Thanks!
customers.canonicalOrder: Grande Iced Double Berry Matcha, with oat milk, light ice, Bacon, Sausage & Egg Wrap

customers.name: Liam
customers.orderText: Hey, I need a Venti Caramel Macchiato, extra hot, with oat milk please. And, uh, no caramel drizzle. Thanks!
customers.canonicalOrder: Venti Caramel Macchiato, extra hot, with oat milk, no caramel drizzle

customers.name: Chloe
customers.orderText: Hi there! Um, so I think I'll do a... a Grande Iced Double Berry Matcha, please. And could I get that with, like, oat milk? And also, maybe light ice, if that's okay? Oh, and also, I'll take an Everything Bagel, warmed with plain cream cheese. Thanks!
customers.canonicalOrder: Grande Iced Double Berry Matcha, with oat milk, light ice, Everything Bagel, warmed, with plain cream cheese

customers.name: Sarah
customers.orderText: Hi there! Um, I think I'll do a... what's that, the Sugar-Free Caramel Protein Latte? Yeah, that one. Can I get that, like, a Venti, please? And um, could you make it with oat milk? And, oh, actually, make it extra hot, please. And could I also get a butter croissant, warmed? Thanks!
customers.canonicalOrder: Venti Sugar-Free Caramel Protein Latte, with oat milk, extra hot, Warmed Butter Croissant

customers.name: Eleanor
customers.orderText: Oh, good morning, dear! How are you today? Now, what was I going to have... Oh, yes! I'll have one of your... Cold Brews, the, uh, the smaller one. Is that a Tall? Yes, a Tall. And, um, could I have that with, oh, what's it called... oat milk, please? Yes, oat milk. And just a little less ice than usual, if you wouldn't mind. Thank you so much, you're a dear.
customers.canonicalOrder: Tall Cold Brew with oat milk, light ice

customers.name: Emily
customers.orderText: Hi there! Um, could I get, like, a... a doppio espresso? Yeah, doppio. And can I have that with blonde roast, please? Oh, and actually, could you do an extra shot? So three shots total. And, uh, with oat milk, please. And could I get vanilla syrup? Just half sweet, though. Oh, and also, a Yuzu Citrus Blossom, warmed.
customers.canonicalOrder: Doppio Espresso, Blonde Espresso, with an extra shot, with oat milk, with vanilla syrup, half sweet, Yuzu Citrus Blossom, Warmed

customers.name: Chloe
customers.orderText: Oh, hi! Um, okay, so I need to grab something quickly. Can I get a Toasted Coconut Cream Cold Brew? Grande, please. And actually, could you do that with light ice? And, um, you know what, I'll also grab a Chocolate Pistachio Loaf. Could that be warmed up, please? Thanks!
customers.canonicalOrder: Grande Toasted Coconut Cream Cold Brew, light ice, Warmed Chocolate Pistachio Loaf

customers.name: Brenda
customers.orderText: Hi there! How are you today? Could I get, um, a Brown Sugar Oatmilk Cortado, please? And actually, could we do that, like, extra hot? I always find they cool down so quickly. Oh, and I prefer it with light foam, if that's possible. And then, do you have those Cheese Danishes? Yes, one of those, warmed please. Thank you so much, sweetie!
customers.canonicalOrder: Brown Sugar Oatmilk Cortado, extra hot, light foam, Cheese Danish, Warmed

customers.name: Sarah
customers.orderText: Hi there! Um, could I get a... let's see. A Vanilla Sweet Cream Cold Brew, please? Yeah, a Grande. And actually, could you do it, like, half sweet? I'm trying to cut back a little, you know? And could I get just a quarter inch splash of the vanilla sweet cream? Like, not too much. Oh, and I'll also grab one of those... the Banana, Walnut & Pecan Loaf. Could I get that warmed up, please? Thanks!
customers.canonicalOrder: Grande Vanilla Sweet Cream Cold Brew, half sweet, 1/4 Inch Splash of Vanilla Sweet Cream, Warmed Banana, Walnut & Pecan Loaf

customers.name: Chloe
customers.orderText: Hey! Um, can I get a Grande Iced Banana Bread Matcha? Yes, please. And could I get that with oat milk? Oh, and actually, could I do light ice on that? Yeah, just a little. And then, uh, can I also grab one of those Pumpkin & Pepita Loaves? And could you warm that up for me? Thanks so much!
customers.canonicalOrder: Grande Iced Banana Bread Matcha, with oat milk, light ice, Pumpkin & Pepita Loaf, Warmed
